name: capnproto_dart
desc: A pure Dart implementation of Cap'n Proto serialization and streaming.

name: AnnotationInfo
desc:
A single annotation application captured from the schema (e.g.
$myAnno("hello")), as emitted by capnpc-dart.

name: AnyPointerBuilder
desc: Writable view of an AnyPointer field.

name: AnyPointerBuilder
desc:
Generated code always passes a schema-verified ptrIndex, but the
dynamic/reflection API (see DynamicStructBuilder) lets callers supply
an arbitrary one — validate here so an out-of-range index fails loudly
instead of silently corrupting whatever word follows this struct's
pointer section in the segment.

name: clear
desc: Zeroes the pointer word, encoding it as Cap'n Proto's null pointer.

name: initStructList
desc: Holds the raw list builder created by this operation.

name: setMessageBytes
desc:
messageBytes is re-parsed as its own standalone message; pass
options with the limits appropriate for its source if it may be
untrusted (see StructBuilder.setAnyPointerFromMessage).

name: AnyPointerCodec
desc: Encodes and decodes values carried through schema type parameters.

name: AnyPointerReader
desc: Read-only view of an AnyPointer field.

name: CapabilityListBuilder
desc: List builder for capability fields stored as cap-table indices.

name: CapabilityListReader
desc: List of capability references stored as cap-table indices.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: CapabilityPointer
desc: Pointer to an entry in the message's capability table.

name: CapnpException
desc: Reports a Cap'n Proto failure with a category and optional cause.

name: cause
desc:
The lower-level error this one wraps, if any — Rust's .context()
equivalent. Set when a layer catches an error and re-throws with
higher-level meaning, without discarding the original.

name: DecodeException
desc: Reports malformed input or a configured decoding-limit violation.

name: DynamicListBuilder
desc: Schema-less list builder used by the dynamic API.

name: DynamicListReader
desc: Schema-less list reader metadata used by the dynamic API.

name: DynamicStructBuilder
desc: Schema-less struct builder used by the dynamic API.

name: DynamicStructReader
desc: Schema-less struct reader used by the dynamic API.

name: EnumRefTypeSchemaInfo
desc: References an enum schema type by node ID.

name: EnumSchemaInfo
desc: Describes an enum schema node and its enumerants.

name: EnumerantSchemaInfo
desc: Describes one enum value and its wire ordinal.

name: ordinal
desc: The enumerant's wire value (@N in schema source).

name: ErrorKind
desc:
Broad classification of why a Cap'n Proto operation failed — mirrors
capnp::ErrorKind so it round-trips losslessly with real Cap'n Proto
peers over RPC (see rpc.capnp's Exception.Type, whose wire values
match this enum's declaration order exactly: index 0 = failed ... 3 =
unimplemented).

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: FieldBodySchemaInfo
desc: Represents the body of a slot or group field.

name: FieldSchemaInfo
desc: Describes a named struct field and its union metadata.

name: GroupFieldSchemaInfo
desc: Describes a group field by its struct type ID.

name: InterfaceRefTypeSchemaInfo
desc: References an interface schema type and its type arguments.

name: InterfaceSchemaInfo
desc: Describes an interface schema node, methods, and superclasses.

name: ListBuilder
desc: Writable view of a Cap'n Proto list field.

name: ListElementSize
desc: Element size encoding used in list pointers.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ListOrphan
desc: An orphaned list (including Text/Data, which are byte-element lists).

name: ListReader
desc: Read-only, iterable view of a Cap'n Proto list field.

name: iterator
desc: A new Iterator that allows iterating the elements of this Iterable.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: ListTypeSchemaInfo
desc: Describes a list schema type and its element type.

name: MessageAnyPointerCodec
desc:
Codec for callers that already have a serialized single-root message for a
generic value.

name: MessageBuilder
desc: Builds and serializes a Cap'n Proto message.

name: MessageBuilder.withScratchSpace
desc:
Builds a message using scratchSpace as backing memory for the first
segment instead of a freshly heap-allocated buffer — avoids an
allocation per message when building many messages in a loop with the
same reusable buffer (see ArenaBuilder.withScratchSpace).

name: adoptRoot
desc:
Adopts orphan as this message's root, replacing whatever's there.
Zero-copy — see StructBuilder.adoptPointerField. orphan must have
been disowned from this same message. On failure, orphan remains
available for another adoption attempt.

name: initDynamicRoot
desc:
Allocates the root struct as a schema-less DynamicStructBuilder with
dataWords/pointerWords words, for callers building a message purely
from runtime StructSchemaInfo reflection metadata (see
text_format.dart's decodeText) rather than a generated
StructFactory.

name: initRoot
desc: Initializes and returns a typed root builder.

name: serialize
desc: Serializes this message using standard Cap'n Proto framing.

name: serializePacked
desc: Serializes this message using Cap'n Proto packed encoding.

name: MessageReader
desc: Reads a validated Cap'n Proto message from framed or packed bytes.

name: canonicalize
desc:
Returns the canonical
encoding of this message: every struct's data and pointer sections are
trimmed of trailing default-valued words, and lists of structs are
re-packed to the smallest uniform element size that still fits every
element.

name: deserialize
desc: Parses standard framed message bytes using options.

name: deserializePacked
desc: Unpacks and parses packed message bytes using options.

name: getRoot
desc: Returns the root as the typed reader created by factory.

name: getRootRaw
desc: Returns the raw struct reader for the root object.

name: MessageReaderOptions
desc: Configures resource limits applied while decoding a message.

name: maxSegments
desc:
Maximum number of segments a message's framing header may declare.
Guards against a small message claiming an enormous segment count and
forcing a correspondingly large up-front allocation before any content
is read. Legitimate messages essentially never need more than a
handful of segments. Default: 512.

name: nestingLimit
desc:
Maximum pointer nesting depth allowed.
Guards against stack overflow. Default: 64.

name: traversalLimitInWords
desc:
Maximum number of 8-byte words allowed to be traversed.
Guards against amplification attacks. Default: 8 * 1024 * 1024 (64 MiB).

name: MessageStream
desc: Utilities for reading and writing streams of Cap'n Proto messages.

name: deserializeStream
desc: Deserializes a stream of framed Cap'n Proto messages.

name: deserializeStreamRaw
desc:
Like deserializeStream but yields the raw framed bytes for each message
instead of a parsed MessageReader.  Useful when the caller needs both
the parsed content and the original bytes (e.g., to echo them back in an
Unimplemented response).

name: serializeStream
desc:
Serializes a stream of MessageBuilders into a stream of framed byte
chunks, one Uint8List per message.

name: MethodSchemaInfo
desc: Describes an interface method and its parameter and result types.

name: initAt
desc:
Allocates innerCount-element inner list at outer slot index and
returns a builder for it.

name: NestedListReader
desc:
List whose elements are themselves lists — used for Cap'n Proto
List(List(T)) fields.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: Orphan
desc:
A detached Cap'n Proto object. See the file-level doc comment for the
zero-copy/same-arena contract. Created by StructBuilder.disownPointerField;
consumed exactly once by StructBuilder.adoptPointerField or
MessageBuilder.adoptRoot — adopting the same Orphan twice throws
StateError.

name: PrimitiveTypeSchemaInfo
desc: Describes a primitive schema type by name.

name: RawListReader
desc: Untyped view of a list's memory inside a segment, used by generated list readers.

name: dataByteOffset
desc: Byte offset within segment to the first element (or first element byte).

name: RawStructBuilder
desc: Untyped view of a struct's memory inside a writable segment, used by generated builders.

name: RawStructReader
desc: Untyped view of a struct's memory inside a segment, used by generated readers.

name: SchemaInfo
desc: Lightweight schema reflection metadata emitted by capnpc-dart.

name: annotations
desc:
Annotations applied directly to this node (e.g. $myAnno(...) right
after a struct/enum/interface declaration). Empty if none.

name: SchemaRegistry
desc:
Maps a schema node id to its SchemaInfo (struct or enum), so
encodeText/decodeText can resolve the nested struct/enum types
referenced by field types. Node ids are globally unique, so one registry
can cover an entire schema file (or several).

name: SlotFieldSchemaInfo
desc: Describes a data or pointer slot field.

name: StructBuilder
desc: Base class for all generated struct builders.

name: adoptPointerField
desc:
Adopts orphan into the pointer at ptrIndex (zero-copy — see
orphan.dart), replacing whatever was there. Passing null clears the
field. Object content is never copied, although cross-segment adoption
allocates a two-word double-far landing pad. On failure, orphan remains
available for another adoption attempt.

name: asReader
desc: Returns a read-only live view over this builder's data.

name: disownPointerField
desc:
Detaches the pointer at ptrIndex as an Orphan (zero-copy — see
orphan.dart), leaving the field unset. Returns null if the field was
already unset. Existing builders and readers are not invalidated; they
remain live aliases of the detached object's arena memory.

name: hasPointerField
desc: Returns true if the pointer slot at ptrIndex has been written.

name: initBiNestedListField
desc: Allocates a List(List(List(T))) field and returns a builder for the outer list.

name: initCapabilityListField
desc: Allocates a List(Interface) field with count capability pointer slots.

name: initNestedListField
desc: Allocates a List(List(T)) field and returns a builder for the outer list.

name: initStructFieldWith
desc:
Allocates a new nested struct for the pointer at ptrIndex and returns
a typed builder via fromRaw.

name: initStructListFieldWith
desc:
Allocates a composite struct list with count elements and returns a
typed builder via fromRaw.

name: raw
desc:
Exposes the underlying raw builder so that group accessors generated by
capnpc-dart can forward the same raw bytes to their own constructor.

name: rawToReader
desc: Returns a read-only live view over this builder's current contents.

name: setAnyPointerFromMessage
desc:
Embeds messageBytes (a serialized Cap'n Proto message) as the
AnyPointer at ptrIndex.

name: setCapabilityField
desc:
Writes a capability pointer at ptrIndex referencing capTableIndex
within the message's capability table.

name: setDataField
desc:
Writes a Data (raw bytes) pointer at ptrIndex.
Passing null leaves the slot zeroed (null pointer).

name: setTextField
desc:
Writes a Text (UTF-8 string) pointer at ptrIndex.
Passing null leaves the slot zeroed (null pointer).

name: StructFactory
desc:
Factory that carries struct layout information and constructs typed
reader/builder instances from raw arena pointers.

name: dataWords
desc: Number of 8-byte words in the struct's data section.

name: fromRawBuilder
desc: Wraps raw in a typed builder.

name: fromRawReader
desc: Wraps raw in a typed reader.

name: fromRawReaderWithCapabilities
desc: Wraps raw in a typed reader with an RPC capability table.

name: ptrWords
desc: Number of 8-byte words in the struct's pointer section.

name: schema
desc: Optional generated schema metadata for this struct.

name: StructReader
desc: Base class for all generated struct readers.

name: capabilityTable
desc: Capability table associated with this struct's message payload.

name: getAnyPointerAsMessageBytes
desc:
Reads the AnyPointer at ptrIndex, deep-copies the referenced struct
into a new standalone message, and returns the serialized bytes.
Returns null if the pointer is null.

name: getAnyPointerField
desc: Returns a typed view of the AnyPointer at ptrIndex.

name: getCapabilityField
desc:
Returns the capability-table index stored in the capability pointer at
ptrIndex, or -1 if the pointer is absent or not a capability pointer.

name: getCapabilityListField
desc: Reads a List(Interface) field at ptrIndex.

name: getCapabilityListFieldWith
desc: Reads a typed List(Interface) field at ptrIndex.

name: getCapabilityObjectField
desc:
Returns the capability object referenced by ptrIndex, or null if the
pointer is null / not a capability pointer.

name: getDataField
desc:
Reads a Data (raw bytes) field from the pointer at ptrIndex.
Returns defaultValue if the pointer is null (see getTextField).

name: getEnumListField
desc:
Reads a list of enum values (stored as uint16) from ptrIndex.
fromInt maps the raw integer to E? (null = unknown discriminant).

name: getNestedListField
desc:
Reads a List(List(T)) from ptrIndex.
fromRaw converts each inner RawListReader to ListReader<T>.

name: getStructFieldWith
desc:
Reads a nested struct from the pointer at ptrIndex. Returns the
struct decoded from defaultValue if the pointer is null and
defaultValue is given (see getTextField for how this default
mechanism relates to the plain "field absent" case); returns null
otherwise.

name: getStructListFieldWith
desc:
Reads a composite struct list from the pointer at ptrIndex.
Returns null if the pointer is null and no defaultValue is given.

name: getTextField
desc:
Reads a Text (UTF-8 string) from the pointer at ptrIndex.
Returns defaultValue if the pointer is null — either because the
field is genuinely absent (older message / never set) or, per the
Cap'n Proto default-value spec, because it was explicitly set back to
the schema-declared default (which pointer fields encode as a null
pointer, same as "unset").

name: getVoidListField
desc:
Reads a List(Void) from the pointer at ptrIndex.
Returns null if the pointer is null and no defaultValue is given.

name: hasPointerField
desc: Returns true if the pointer at ptrIndex is non-null.

name: raw
desc:
Exposes the underlying raw reader so that group accessors generated by
capnpc-dart can forward the same raw bytes to their own constructor.

name: StructReaderAnyPointerCodec
desc: Codec for generic values whose runtime representation is a struct reader.

name: StructRefTypeSchemaInfo
desc: References a struct schema type and its type arguments.

name: StructSchemaInfo
desc: Describes the runtime layout and fields of a struct schema node.

name: TypeParameterSchemaInfo
desc: Identifies a generic schema type parameter by index.

name: TypeSchemaInfo
desc: Represents a field or type-parameter type in runtime schema metadata.

name: TypedCapabilityListReader
desc: Typed view over a List(Interface) using an RPC capability table.

name: length
desc: The number of elements in this Iterable.

name: WirePointer
desc: Decoded representation of a single Cap'n Proto wire pointer (8 bytes).

name: decode
desc: Decodes the pointer stored at wordOffset (0-based) within data.

name: encode
desc: Encodes this pointer into data at the given wordOffset.

name: boolListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a BoolListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: canonicalizeMessage
desc:
Deep-copies the root pointer of messageBytes into the
canonical form of
the message: every struct's data and pointer sections are trimmed of
trailing default-valued (all-zero / null) words, and lists of structs are
re-packed to the smallest uniform element size that still fits every
element.

name: capabilityListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a CapabilityListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: capabilityListFromRaw
desc: Creates a CapabilityListReader from a RawListReader.

name: dataListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a DataListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: decodeText
desc:
Parses text (Cap'n Proto text format, e.g. (name = "hi", size = 3))
against schema and returns a standalone, framed Cap'n Proto message
(ready for MessageReader.deserialize(...).getRoot(fooFactory)).

name: encodeText
desc:
Renders reader as Cap'n Proto text format, e.g. (name = "hi", size = 3) — matching capnp decode --short's output (a single line, no space
padding inside the parens).

name: enumListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates an EnumListBuilder from a RawListBuilder and a toInt function.

name: float32ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a Float32 PrimitiveDoubleListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: float64ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a Float64 PrimitiveDoubleListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: int8ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates an Int8 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: int16ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates an Int16 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: int32ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates an Int32 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: int64ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates an Int64 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: schemaRegistryOf
desc:
Builds a SchemaRegistry from a list of xxxSchema constants (as
exposed by every generated struct/enum, e.g. FooReader.schema).

name: structListBuilderFromRaw
desc:
Creates a StructListBuilder from a RawListBuilder and a fromRaw
factory function.

name: textListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a TextListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: uint8ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a UInt8 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: uint16ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a UInt16 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: uint32ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a UInt32 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: uint64ListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a UInt64 PrimitiveIntListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.

name: voidListBuilderFromRaw
desc: Creates a VoidListBuilder from a RawListBuilder.
